author: nflaig
content:
in regard to your comment <@363800010518822915> 
> do we know if you are requesting canonical blocks? <@586161934425128960>  i do see prysm today have a bug that if blocks are not canonical (no longer kept) we would return zero response instead of a proper error code like RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE. 
> 
> other than that, i saw a bunch of rate limited error, but you should see that on your end as well

I haven't debugged that further (was 2am on saturday) and now the devnet is down, I don't think it was even prysm serving these empty payload responses

there is another bug in lodestar that we spam peers too much, get rate limited and eventually banned

I managed to get lodestar to sync eventually by fixing it on our end
